overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The journey transitions from narrow commercial streets through an intersection and down into a lower plaza with digital billboards, ending in a covered walkway with views of the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with palm trees and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk between tall commercial buildings with neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark building with metallic facade and horizontal lines
tall palm tree planted in sidewalk planter
raised highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead
illuminated medical clinic sign with teal lighting
tall street light with traffic signals attached

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow commercial street at dusk. Tall dark buildings line both sides with neon signage visible, while palm trees and street lamps punctuate the sidewalk. The elevated highway structure is visible in the distance, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial buildings and traffic

events.description: waiting at traffic light as futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection
crossing the street and continuing along the road edge past commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and walking along the street edge past the Wilsons Management building

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection with headlights on
character in yellow jacket and shorts standing near the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with teal neon signage reading WILSONS MANAGEMENT
tall skyscraper with large illuminated 03 display on the facade
red structural bridge or walkway spanning over the street with support beams
white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an urban intersection, waiting for traffic before proceeding. The Wilsons Management building with its distinctive teal neon signage dominates the right side, while a towering skyscraper displaying 03 rises in the distance. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the street, and the camera moves from the narrow sidewalk into the open intersection space.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza with digital billboards and outdoor dining area

events.description: descending wide stairs into a lower covered plaza area with outdoor seating
moving under building overhang where artificial lighting becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a plaza with outdoor seating, food stalls, and large digital screens

notable_agents.action: person in red top and dark pants walking up the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying red and white imagery on the building wall
row of green patio umbrellas over outdoor dining tables with chairs
small illuminated food vendor stall with orange and green lighting
wide concrete stairs leading down to the lower plaza level

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide staircase into a lower plaza area sheltered by building overhangs. Large digital billboards illuminate the space with red and white imagery, while green umbrellas shade outdoor dining tables. Food stalls line the left side, and pedestrians move through the semi-covered space as artificial lighting takes over from the fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass railings and city skyline view

events.description: entering covered walkway with glass railings overlooking the distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza with neon accent lighting and views of distant illuminated skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated 05 display visible on the facade
overhead roof structure with recessed lighting providing shelter
transparent glass safety barrier along the edge of the walkway
cityscape of illuminated skyscrapers and neon bridges visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered pedestrian walkway with glass railings on the right. The digital tower displaying 05 dominates the left side, while the open view ahead reveals a stunning distant skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and neon bridges against the dusk sky. The space is quieter with fewer pedestrians, featuring overhead lighting and a smooth paved surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from narrow commercial streets into a sprawling, multi-level urban plaza. It begins by moving along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and dark buildings under a dusk sky, before the camera pushes forward into an open urban intersection dominated by the teal glow of the Wilsons Management building and towering skyscrapers. As the character proceeds, the scene shifts downward via a wide staircase into a sheltered lower plaza where fading natural light is replaced by the red and white glare of massive digital billboards and the glow of food stalls. The movement finally flows into a quiet, covered pedestrian walkway with glass railings, opening up to a panoramic view of an illuminated skyline and neon bridges stretching across the horizon.
